basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Nurse – II. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through JIPMER official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course, B.Sc. (Nursing) / M.Sc. (Nursing), Experience in working in projects / programs at state or district level, Work experience in field level (community)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Nurse – II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: JIPMER Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
